headline: Clean calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), the only active ticket on your plate.

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into open escalations or high-priority cases. Fix urgently.

AE-1079 has no due date set; consider setting one this week to keep accountability.

outcomes.business_impact: No concrete business impact captured yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the primary adoption-driving work in progress.

slack_summary: Clean slate today: no meetings, no emails, no Slack pings. Top priority is making real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc) — your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: get Salesforce and Snowflake credentials fixed so you regain visibility into escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today — deep work day.
